layout.tagline: Welcome to the FIFA World Cup 2026 prediction game – follow matches, place your predictions, and compete with your colleagues.

passwordReset.subject: World Cup 2026 - Competition – Reset password
passwordReset.title: Reset password
passwordReset.footer: This link is valid for 1 hour. If you did not request this, please ignore this email.
passwordReset.fallback: If the button does not work: {link}

emailVerification.subject: World Cup 2026 - Competition – Verify email
emailVerification.title: Verify email
emailVerification.body: Please verify your email address to sign in:
emailVerification.footer: This link is valid for 24 hours.
emailVerification.fallback: If the button does not work: {link}

missingPredictions.subject: World Cup 2026 - Competition – {missingCount} missing predictions
missingPredictions.title: Missing predictions
missingPredictions.body: You still have {missingCount} open predictions in the next 48 hours.
missingPredictions.noneUpcoming: No missing predictions in the next 48 hours.
missingPredictions.fallback: If the button does not work: {link}
missingPredictions.notificationBody: You still have {missingCount} open predictions in the next 48 hours.

bonusReminder.subject: World Cup 2026 - Competition – Bonus question closing soon
bonusReminder.title: Bonus question

manualTipReminder.subject: World Cup 2026 - Competition – Reminder: submit predictions
manualTipReminder.title: Prediction reminder
manualTipReminder.bodyWithMissing: You still have {missingCount} open predictions in the next 48 hours. Submit them in time to collect points.
manualTipReminder.bodyGeneric: Check your open matches and submit your predictions in time.

morningDigest.subject: World Cup 2026 - Competition – Good morning: Your daily update
morningDigest.title: Morning Digest
morningDigest.intro: Here is your daily World Cup update with results, standings and highlights:
morningDigest.notRanked: You are not on the leaderboard yet.
morningDigest.yourTeam: Your team "{teamName}" is ranked #{rank} ({points} avg. points).
morningDigest.teamNotRanked: Your team "{teamName}" is not ranked yet.
morningDigest.noHighlights: No special highlights today – check back tomorrow!
morningDigest.missingTips: You still have {count} open predictions in the next 48 hours:
morningDigest.notificationBody: {matchCount} matches last night – check your standing.

highlight.matchOfNight: Match of the night: {homeTeam} {homeScore}:{awayScore} {awayTeam} – {totalPoints} points awarded.
highlight.topScorer: {name} earned the most points last night ({points} pts).

statusUpdate.subject: World Cup 2026 - Competition – Current standings
statusUpdate.title: Status update
statusUpdate.intro: Here is the current status in the prediction game:
statusUpdate.notRanked: You are not on the leaderboard yet.
statusUpdate.yourTeam: Your team "{teamName}" is ranked #{rank} in the team standings ({points} avg. points).
statusUpdate.teamNotRanked: Your team "{teamName}" is not ranked in the team standings yet.

test.subject: World Cup 2026 - Competition – Test email
test.title: Test
test.text: Test successful! The email configuration is working.

disclaimer.userCoach: Strategic AI help – no guarantee for results.
disclaimer.leaderboardSummary: AI summary based on current data.

ai.defaultCoachPrompt: Give me a brief overview of my current prediction situation and what I should do next.

dashboardInsights.exactMany: You have already tipped {count} exact results.
